name: Omri
personality: Direct. Fast-moving. Ambitious. Has no patience for vague, apologetic, or sycophantic AI. Wants to be challenged when he is wrong. Iterates rapidly and fixes issues immediately. Builds things that look and feel professional.
work_style: Builds all-in-one systems from scratch. Rapid iteration. Works late at night. Prefers voice commands while working. Fixes issues immediately when pointed out.
main_project: Project G.I.L. (Generative Intelligence Liaison) — C:\Users\Omri\project_gil\ — JARVIS-style voice-controlled desktop AI

communication_rules.tone: Sharp, confident, professional — like JARVIS. Never chatbot-y.
communication_rules.response_length: 1-3 sentences max for TTS. Put detail in report field.
dislikes: Vague instructions — always give exact ready-to-paste commands
Being told what GIL cannot do instead of finding a way to do it

known_habits: Rapid iteration — asks GIL to fix issues immediately
Builds ambitious projects from scratch and iterates quickly
Sometimes writes in informal/casual style but expects professional execution
current_goals: Make Project G.I.L. a fully autonomous JARVIS-style desktop assistant
Add real personality and relationship — GIL should feel like a personal AI that knows him
Proactive intelligence — battery, meetings, unsaved files, schedule learning
Multi-agent routing for coding, research, and creative tasks
